title: China’s open-weights AI strategy is winning
author: benwerd
aiHeadline: While the rest of the world is stuck with locked-down AI, China's open-source strategy is proving that collaboration actually works.

title: Airport Simulator
author: apunen
aiHeadline: Because who doesn't want to spend hours simulating airport operations? Now you can, thanks to this new game that will make you question your life choices.

title: Claude Fable produced a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture
author: loubbrad
aiHeadline: In a move that will make math professors everywhere either thrilled or jealous, Claude Fable has just ruined a perfectly good conjecture with this counterexample.

title: Hacker wipes Romania's land registry database
author: speckx
aiHeadline: Romania's land registry database just had the worst day ever, thanks to a hacker who decided to wipe it clean. Now they'll have to start from scratch, which is about as fun as it sounds.

title: The EU is about to sell our most sensitive data to the US for visa-free travel
author: rapnie
aiHeadline: The EU is offering up our most sensitive data as a sacrifice to the US for visa-free travel. Privacy, thy name is not a priority anymore.
